questions.question: What is the primary function of error detection and correction in computer networks?
options: To detect and correct errors in data transmission
questions.explanation: Error detection and correction ensure that data is transmitted correctly and can be re-sent if errors occur.

questions.question: What type of code is used to detect errors in data transmission?
questions.explanation: Block codes are used to detect errors in data transmission, they divide the data into fixed-length blocks.

questions.question: What is the main advantage of using cyclic codes in error detection and correction?
options: They are more complex to implement
They provide better error detection capabilities
They are more efficient in data transmission
They are less expensive to implement
questions.explanation: Cyclic codes provide better error detection capabilities as they can detect errors more efficiently.

questions.question: What is the primary disadvantage of using block codes in error detection and correction?
options: They are more complex to implement
They are less efficient in data transmission
They provide better error detection capabilities
They are less expensive to implement
questions.explanation: Block codes are less efficient in data transmission as they divide the data into fixed-length blocks.

questions.question: What type of code is used to correct errors in data transmission?
questions.explanation: Cyclic codes can also be used to correct errors in data transmission, they provide better error correction capabilities.
